params.name: domain
params.description: The domain name from which you want to find email addresses.

params.name: company
params.description: The company name from which you want to find email addresses.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of email addresses returned (1-100, default 10).

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of email addresses to skip.

params.name: type
params.description: Restrict to personal or generic email addresses.

params.name: department
params.description: Comma-separated departments (executive, it, finance, management, sales, legal, support, hr, marketing, communication, education, design, health, operations).

params.name: required_field
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields that must be present in each returned email.

items.docs: Search for all email addresses corresponding to a given domain or company, including the discovered email pattern, organization metadata, and per-email confidence scores and verification status.
